Widget.title: Widget
Widget.description: A generated KWGT widget prompt and instructions

userId.description: The ID of the user who generated the widget

prompt.description: The user's prompt describing the widget

aspectRatio.description: The aspect ratio used for the mockup image

mockupUrl.description: The URL of the generated mockup image (base64 data URI or storage URL)

instructions.description: Detailed step-by-step instructions to build the widget

kodes.description: Relevant KWGT formulas (Kodes) needed for the widget

createdAt.description: The time the widget was generated
